# svgic

> Interactive SVG client for JS/TS/Vue 3/React. Embeds SVG into the DOM, binds layers to data, handles events, supports popups, styles, and plugins.

## Installation

```bash
npm install @svgic/core
```

## Documentation

- Full API Reference: [docs/api.md](docs/api.md)
- Practical examples (recipes): [docs/recipes.md](docs/recipes.md)

---

## Key Concepts

- **Layers** — `<g id="...">` elements in the SVG file. Layer role (`interactive` | `decorative`) is set in config, not in SVG.
- **Data** — an array of `SvgicItem[]`, bound to elements by matching `id`.
- **Initialization is async** — `await client.ready` before calling `setData()` and plugin APIs.
- **Plugins** — extend behavior via hooks: `onInit`, `onElementClick`, `onElementHover`, etc.

---

## Basic Example (vanilla JS/TS)

```ts
import { Svgic } from '@svgic/core'

const client = new Svgic('#container', {
  src: '/map.svg',
  layers: {
    rooms:      { role: 'interactive' },
    background: { role: 'decorative' },
  },
  data: [
    { id: 'room-101', title: 'Conference Room' },
    { id: 'room-102', title: 'Open Space' },
  ],
  popup: true,
  style: {
    default: { fill: '#e2e8f0', cursor: 'pointer', transition: 'fill 0.2s' },
    hover:   { fill: '#93c5fd' },
    states:  { busy: { fill: '#fca5a5' }, free: { fill: '#86efac' } },
  },
})

await client.ready

client.on('click', (id, item) => console.log(id, item))
client.setHighlight('busy', ['room-101'])
```

## Vue 3

```vue
<template>
  <SvgicVue src="/map.svg" :data="rooms" :popup="true" @click="onRoomClick" />
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { SvgicVue } from '@svgic/core/vue'
import type { SvgicItem } from '@svgic/core'

const rooms = ref<SvgicItem[]>([{ id: 'room-101', title: 'Conference Room' }])
const onRoomClick = (id: string, item: SvgicItem | null) => console.log(id, item)
</script>
```

## React

```tsx
import { SvgicReact } from '@svgic/core/react'

<SvgicReact
  src="/map.svg"
  data={rooms}
  popup={true}
  onClick={(id, item) => console.log(id, item)}
/>
```

---

## Public API (quick reference)

```ts
// Constructor
new Svgic(selector: string | Element, options: SvgicOptions)

// Wait for initialization
await client.ready

// Methods
client.setData(data: SvgicItem[])
client.on('click' | 'hover' | 'leave', (id, item) => void)
client.setHighlight(state: string, ids: string[])
client.clearHighlight(state?: string)
client.getElement(): SVGSVGElement | null
client.use(plugin: SvgicPlugin)
client.destroy()
```

---

## Plugins

```ts
import { ZoomPlugin } from '@svgic/core/plugins/zoom'
import { DebugPlugin } from '@svgic/core/plugins/debug'

// ZoomPlugin — zoom/pan via wheel, drag, touch
const zoom = ZoomPlugin({ wheelMode: 'ctrl', focusOnClick: true })
zoom.zoomTo(2)
zoom.focusElement('room-101')
zoom.reset()

// DebugPlugin — shows element ids on hover (dev only)
const debug = DebugPlugin({ showOn: 'both' })
```

---

## Data Types

```ts
interface SvgicItem {
  id: string
  title?: string
  description?: string
  image?: string
  link?: string
  [key: string]: unknown  // custom fields
}

interface SvgicOptions {
  src: string                          // URL or SVG string
  data?: SvgicItem[]
  layers?: Record<string, { role: 'interactive' | 'decorative' }>
  plugins?: SvgicPlugin[]
  popup?: boolean | PopupConfig        // see docs/api.md
  style?: SvgicStyleConfig             // see docs/api.md
}
```
